test_cases.description: Verify an invoice is created in QuickBooks when a qualifying booking/transaction completes in LakbayHub.
test_cases.expected_result: Invoice created in QuickBooks corresponding to the LakbayHub transaction.

test_cases.description: Verify invoice line items (service, quantity, amount) match the booking details.
test_cases.expected_result: All line items, quantities, and amounts match exactly.

test_cases.description: Verify total invoice amount matches the transaction total, including taxes/fees.
test_cases.expected_result: Totals match exactly with no rounding/calculation discrepancies.

test_cases.description: Verify invoice is linked to the correct existing customer record in QuickBooks.
test_cases.expected_result: Invoice correctly linked to existing customer; no duplicate customer created.

test_cases.description: Verify a payment made against a booking creates/applies a payment record and updates invoice status in QuickBooks.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment recorded and applied to correct invoice; status updates accordingly (e.g., Paid).

test_cases.description: Verify a partial payment updates the invoice balance without marking it fully paid.
test_cases.expected_result: Invoice reflects correct remaining balance and status (Partially Paid), not fully paid.

test_cases.description: Verify re-triggering sync for an already-invoiced booking does not create a duplicate invoice.
test_cases.expected_result: No duplicate invoice created; existing invoice recognized and left as-is.

test_cases.description: Verify cancelled/failed bookings do not generate invoices in QuickBooks.
test_cases.expected_result: No invoice created for cancelled/failed bookings.
test_cases.actual_result: No invoice generated for non-qualifying bookings.

test_cases.description: Verify invoice creation failures (API error/timeout) are logged clearly without leaving inconsistent state.
test_cases.expected_result: Failure logged clearly; booking not marked as successfully invoiced; retry path available.

test_cases.description: Verify invoice consistency between LakbayHub and QuickBooks across bookings using different in-scope payment gateways.
test_cases.expected_result: All invoices consistent across systems regardless of payment gateway used.
test_cases.actual_result: Consistent across all in-scope payment gateways.
